Footer.brand: Backend Developer specialized in end-to-end systems with Java, Go and Rust — robust, scalable and maintainable solutions.

Home.metaDescription: Backend developer with 20+ years in tech: from IT support and farming to building end-to-end systems with Java, Go and Rust.
Home.ogDescription: Backend developer with 20+ years in tech. End-to-end systems with Java, Go and Rust.
Home.heroDescription: Backend systems in Java, Go and Rust — from industrial platforms with predictive ML at the edge (anomaly detection, failure prediction) to AI-powered developer tooling (code generation, automated code review). 20+ years in tech.
Home.aboutSubtitle: Passionate about building robust, scalable software
Home.journeyP1: With over 20 years in tech, I started out in IT support and equipment maintenance — which taught me how systems work from the core out. Then I spent several years farming, where mistakes don't get fixed with a rollback.
Home.journeyP2: That hands-on, dual background brought me back to software. Today I build end-to-end systems with Java, Go and Rust — I own every layer, from the data and backend to the frontend and deployment — and I'm always adding new tech to the mix.
Home.apigenCaption: apigen — a tool I built: from a SQL schema to a complete, running Spring Boot API.
